lessons.name: Review 2 (Units 4 - 5 - 6)
lessons.description: Review of Units 4, 5, and 6 covering the past, experiences, and Vietnamese lifestyles.

sections.heading: 1. Language - Vocabulary
sections.content:
Unit 4: Remembering the Past

Key vocabulary: memory, remember, recall, forget, nostalgia, childhood, ancestor, heritage, tradition, history, ancient, war, peace

Unit 5: Our Experiences

Key vocabulary: experience, adventure, journey, travel, explore, discover, climb, hike, exciting, amazing, unforgettable, memorable

Unit 6: Vietnamese Lifestyles: Then and Now

Key vocabulary: traditional, modern, rural, urban, agricultural, industrial, simple, convenient, change, develop, improve, transform

sections.heading: 2. Language - Grammar
sections.content:
Unit 4: Past Continuous & Wish + Past Simple

Past Continuous: S + was/were + V-ing (at 8 p.m. yesterday, when, while)

Wish: S + wish(es) + S + V (past simple) - ước điều không có thật ở hiện tại

Unit 5: Present Perfect

Structure: S + have/has + V3/ed

Usage: Kinh nghiệm (ever, never), vừa mới (just, already, yet), kéo dài (for, since)

Unit 6: Verb + to V & Verb + V-ing

Verb + to V: want, need, decide, hope, plan

Verb + V-ing: enjoy, love, finish, avoid, mind

Khác nghĩa: remember/forget/stop/try + to V hoặc V-ing

sections.heading: 3. Skills - Reading Passages
sections.content:
Passage 1: Memories and Experiences

When I was young, I was living in a small village. At that time, life was simple and peaceful. I remember playing with my friends every day. I wish I were young again.

I have visited many places in my life. I have never been to Europe, but I have traveled around Asia. I have just returned from Thailand. It was an amazing experience. I'll never forget visiting the temples there.

Passage 2: Vietnamese Lifestyles

Vietnamese lifestyles have changed a lot. In the past, people enjoyed working on farms and living in rural areas. They wanted to preserve their traditions. Now, many people decide to move to cities. They hope to find better jobs and enjoy modern conveniences.

I remember living in the countryside when I was a child. I stopped going there after I moved to the city. But I'll never forget playing in the rice fields. I wish I could visit my hometown more often.

sections.heading: 4. Skills - Practice
sections.content:
Comprehension Questions:

  1. What was the writer doing when they were young?
  2. Has the writer been to Europe?
  3. What do people want to do with their traditions?
  4. What does the writer wish?

examples.question: I ______ (study) at 8 p.m. yesterday.
examples.explanation: Past continuous với thời điểm cụ thể

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Verb + to V / V-ing
problemTypes.method: Phương pháp: Chọn to V hoặc V-ing

exercises.question: I ______ at 8 p.m. yesterday.
exercises.explanation: Past continuous với thời điểm cụ thể

exercises.question: I remember ______ the door. (nhớ đã khóa)
Which sentences use past continuous correctly? (Select all that apply)
options: They were playing when it rained.
While I was working, he was reading.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: was studying, were playing when, was working/was reading. Sai: was cook

exercises.question: Which are correct wish sentences? (Select all that apply)
options: I wish I had a car.
He wishes he could speak English.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: had, were, could. Sai: can (phải là 'could')

exercises.question: Which verbs are followed by V-ing? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Đúng: enjoy + V-ing, finish + V-ing, avoid + V-ing. Sai: want + to V

exercises.question: Fill in: I ______ (watch) TV when he ______ (call).
Fill in: I wish I ______ (have) more time.
Fill in: ______ you ever ______ (be) to Paris?
Fill in: I want ______ (learn) and I enjoy ______ (practice) English.
Rearrange: studying / I / was / at / 8 p.m. / yesterday / . / wish / I / had / I / time / more / .
exercises.sample_answer: I was studying at 8 p.m. yesterday. I wish I had more time.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: past continuous; wish + past simple

exercises.question: Transform: I don't have a car. → I wish ______.
exercises.sample_answer: I wish I had a car.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: don't have → wish + had

exercises.question: Transform: I started living here 5 years ago. I still live here. → I ______.
exercises.sample_answer: I have lived here for 5 years.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: Hành động kéo dài → present perfect + for

exercises.question: Rearrange: want / I / to / learn / English / . / enjoy / I / reading / books / . / finished / have / I / homework / my / .
exercises.sample_answer: I want to learn English. I enjoy reading books. I have finished my homework.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: want + to V; enjoy + V-ing; have + V3

exercises.question: Combine all grammar: I was studying when my friend called. I wish I had more free time. I have lived here for 5 years. I want to learn English and I enjoy reading. (Keep all four sentences)
exercises.sample_answer: I was studying when my friend called. I wish I had more free time. I have lived here for 5 years. I want to learn English and I enjoy reading.
exercises.explanation: Kết hợp: past continuous + when, wish + past simple, present perfect + for, verb + to V/V-ing
